body_transformation: The rounded blob body now features smooth, seamless metallic plating in gunmetal gray with subtle engraved geometric patterns along its surface. The small closed-eye smile remains intact but is now etched into the steel with sharp precision, while the stubby legs transform into reinforced mechanical joints with chrome silver pistons visible at the knees. The curled tail tip becomes a rigid, angular steel bar with a faint blue energy glow running through its core, and the pointed ears are replaced by sleek, aerodynamic metal flaps with indigo accents. All original proportions and silhouette are preserved, with only the material and surface details shifting to reflect steel-type aesthetics.
signature_feature: Tail tip: rigid steel bar with glowing indigo energy lines and angular geometric engraving.
